Log:
  Add a patch to search for configuration files under PREFIX, e.g.

  /usr/local/etc/r10k/r10k.yaml
  /usr/local/etc/r10k.yaml

  While here, pass maintainership to puppet@

  Approved by:	swills (with ruby hat)
